articles.title: A Local Perturbation Theory for Cross-Domain Interference and Recovery in Multi-Domain RL
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training improves large language models (LLMs) on individual domains such as mathematical reasoning, code generation, question answering, and creative writing (CW), but training on one domain often degrades performance on others. articles.summary: 提出局部扰动理论解释多域强化学习中的跨域干扰与恢复。研究发现即使参数未全局漂移，单个域训练也会损害其他域，该理论为多域RL训练提供新解释。

articles.title: Policy and World Modeling Co-Training for Language Agents
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) improves large language model (LLM) agents by teaching them which actions lead to high rewards, but provides little supervision on what those actions do to the environment. articles.summary: 提出策略与世界模型协同训练方法，利用在线RL rollout数据学习环境动态。无需额外模拟器或两阶段训练，提升语言代理的决策效率与对环境的理解。

articles.title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses

articles.title: OpenWebRL: Demystifying Online Multi-turn Reinforcement Learning for Visual Web Agents

articles.title: AutoMedBench: Towards Medical AutoResearch with Agentic AI Models

articles.summary: AutoMedBench是一个工作流感知基准，评估AI代理在端到端医疗AI研究流程中的行为。超越孤立预测任务，提供对代理过程可见性，促进医学自动化研究。

articles.title: 墙外文摘：台湾并非中美关系的核心问题
